about.title: About Me

description.paragraph1: Hi, I'm Galuh Satria. I’m interested in web development and enjoy building websites and web applications that are useful and comfortable to use.
description.paragraph2: I started learning web development independently in December 2021 through various online resources. Over time, I have continued to improve my skills by working on different projects using React, Next.js, Laravel, and other web technologies.
description.paragraph3: While studying Computer Science, I also explored Intelligent Systems and AI, including how artificial intelligence models are built, trained, and applied to solve real-world problems. I’m always excited to learn new things and keep growing as a developer.

about.spotifySubtitle: I really like listening to music 😅
